title: Coconut Tart
description: A rich and creamy dessert featuring a coconut filling in a buttery tart crust.
instructions: Make the tart crust by combining flour and butter in a bowl until a dough forms. Wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Roll out the chilled dough and place in a 9-inch tart pan. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until lightly golden.
In a separate bowl, whisk together coconut milk, eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, and salt. Stir in shredded coconut.
Pour the coconut filling into the baked tart crust and smooth the top.
Return the tart to the oven and bake for an additional 25-30 minutes or until the filling is set.
Allow the tart to cool completely on a wire rack.
Chill the tart in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
